title: sedum annuum
intro: Sedum annuum, also known as Annual Sedum or Red Flowering Stonecrop, is a perennial succulent plant native to the Mediterranean region. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The plant is said to have health benefits such as reducing fever, soothing sore throats, and treating skin conditions like eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Sedum annuum include infusions, decoctions, and salves, which can be used to harness its medicinal and therapeutic properties.
